events.title: Cabochon Workshop
events.description: A cabochon, pronounced cab-uh-shon, is defined as a gemstone that has been shaped and polished rather than faceted . Learn how to cut, shape and polish your own cabochons with us! We will demonstrate and guide you through the entire process of...

events.venue: Eric Rood Center 950 Maidu Ave, Nevada City 95959
events.description: Beginning with Nisenan history into the present day, Lavender Glow reflects upon and celebrates the lived experiences and legacies of queer individuals and groups whose collective influence demonstrate a profound investment in place, arts, and culture. Alongside highlights of local history, Lavender Glow features 44 artworks selected from 127 submissions.

events.description: Come join our vibrant African Drum and Dance classes! Open to all ages and abilities, we explore different styles from across the African Diasporic disciplines. Including Malian, Congolese, Guinean, Senegalese, Afro-Cuban and Afro-Brazilian. Masters of their craft travel from all over to share their culture and heritage with our beautiful community, along with our own fabulous local teachers an...

We'll spend our time focusing on our writing, but with that magical element of doing so within the presence of others. Come discover the amazing experience of writing within the context of a group. Bring your computer, notebook, iPad, or what...
